params.maxBps: Maximum fee in basis points (e.g., 500 = 5%) for low-trust users
params.minBps: Minimum fee in basis points (e.g., 25 = 0.25%) for high-trust users

params.highVolumeThreshold: Above this daily volume = high (fees decrease)
params.lowVolumeThreshold: Below this daily volume = low (fees increase)

params.dailyBurnCap: Maximum tokens to burn per day (0 = unlimited)
params.ecosystemMinBps: Minimum ecosystem fee in basis points (ensures funding)
params.minimumSupplyFloor: Supply floor below which burns pause (0 = no floor)

params.maxTransfer: Max tokens per single transfer (0 = disabled)

params.active: True to enable, false to disable
params.duration: Duration in seconds (max 7 days). Ignored when disabling.

vault_freezeVault(address,bool).details: Requires vault owner cooperation or DAO recovery process

emergency_recoverETH(address).notice: Recover ETH sent to this contract

emergency_recoverTokens(address,address,.notice: Recover ERC20 tokens sent to this contract

fees_getEffectiveRates(address).notice: Get effective fee rates for a user

fees_previewForScore(uint16).notice: Preview fee for a specific ProofScore

fees_setPolicy(uint16,uint16).notice: Set fee curve parameters (linear interpolation between min and max)

hasVault(address).notice: Check if address owns a vault

presale_emergencyWithdraw().notice: Emergency withdraw (only before sale or after finalization)

presale_enableRefunds().notice: Enable refunds if presale failed to meet goal

presale_finalize(address,address).notice: Finalize presale and create liquidity pool

presale_fundRefunds().notice: Fund refunds by sending ETH to presale contract

presale_setMaxGasPrice(uint256).notice: Update max gas price circuit breaker

presale_withdrawUnsold(address).notice: Withdraw unsold tokens + excess allocation to treasury

seer_setThresholds(uint16,uint16,uint16,.notice: Set ProofScore thresholds (governance, merchant, trust levels)

setContracts(address,address,address,add.notice: Update contract references (if contracts are redeployed)

sustainability_setTokenReference(address.notice: Set token reference on burn router (required for supply checks)

token_batchWhaleLimitExempt(address[],bo.notice: Batch exempt multiple addresses from whale limits

token_isCircuitBreakerActive().notice: Check if circuit breaker is currently active

token_isWhaleLimitExempt(address).notice: Check if address is exempt from whale limits

token_lockPolicy().notice: Lock policy permanently (ONE-WAY - cannot be undone!)

token_remainingDailyLimit(address).notice: Check remaining daily transfer limit for address

token_setAntiWhale(uint256,uint256,uint2.notice: Configure anti-whale limits (set to 0 to disable any limit)

token_setModules(address,address,address.notice: Configure token modules (VaultHub, SecurityHub, Ledger, Router)

token_setSystemExempt(address,bool).notice: Exempt address from vault-only and fees (for system contracts)

token_setWhaleLimitExempt(address,bool).notice: Exempt address from whale limits (for exchanges, liquidity pools)

token_setWhitelist(address,bool).notice: Whitelist address to bypass vault-only (for exchanges/DEXs)

vault_freezeVault(address,bool).notice: Emergency freeze a specific vault (via vault owner)

vault_requestDAORecovery(address,address.notice: Initiate DAO emergency recovery for a vault
